entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of biological systems and organisms to technical and industrial processes for agricultural improvement

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall and high temperatures where specific crops are grown

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall output of farming activities in a specific region

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of crops to achieve desired characteristics

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Plants grown by farmers for food or economic purposes

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity per unit area

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to maintain growth and productivity during water scarcity

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand or repel attacks from pests

entities.name: GENETIC RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific investigation into genetics to develop improved crop cultivars
